series_metadata.series_description: This file series contains information regarding the records for supervisory actions between the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and an institution. The supervisory actions are a result of the findings from the examination process and these records should be retained in accordance with O.R.C. Section 1163.12.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confimation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years after date of termination of the supervisory action, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
